puzzle.title: The Voice of Iron and Psalms
puzzle.intro: A divinely-appointed leader was granted immense wisdom and a unique gift that echoed through the mountains. This individual's story is one of strength, justice, and profound devotion, blending the might of a ruler with the humility of a servant. Can you identify this remarkable figure?
clues: The mountains were commanded to echo my praise, and the birds would gather to join my chorus.
I was given a sacred book, a guide filled with psalms of devotion.
Allah made a hard metal pliable in my hands, a special gift for me to use.
From this softened metal, I fashioned protective coats of mail, linking the rings with precision.
In a decisive battle for my people, I faced and defeated a towering, tyrannical warrior.
My kingdom and prophethood were later inherited by my son, who was also blessed with incredible wisdom.

trial.label: What was my defining confrontation?
options: A contest with the Pharaoh's magicians
Building a great ark before a flood
Being thrown into a blazing fire

location.label: What was I given mastery over?

outcome.label: What was a major blessing I received?
options: Receiving the Tablets of the Law
Being raised to the heavens alive

puzzle.arabic: ۞ وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ مِنَّا فَضْلًۭا ۖ يَـٰجِبَالُ أَوِّبِى مَعَهُۥ وَٱلطَّيْرَ ۖ وَأَلَنَّا لَهُ ٱلْحَدِيدَ
puzzle.verse: And We certainly gave David from Us bounty. [We said], "O mountains, repeat [Our] praises with him, and the birds [as well]." And We made pliable for him iron, (34:10)
